# Toxic Egg

## Description

Whenever you add a Skill into your Deck, Upgrade it.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Raises the value of future Skill rewards, especially block, draw, exhaust, and Armaments-style utility; it does not help the current deck until new Skills are added.
